description_long: This is a large, rustic log cabin constructed primarily from timber logs, featuring a prominent gabled roof with deep overhangs and a dark, matte finish. The structure includes a main central section with two perpendicular wings, creating a T-shaped footprint. Stonework is visible at the base, providing a sturdy foundation and adding to the traditional aesthetic. Multiple windows of varying sizes are distributed across the facades, with a particularly large window on one side and smaller, paired windows on the front. A covered porch with timber railings is attached to one wing, enhancing the cabin's welcoming appearance. The overall design is robust and inviting, suitable for residential use in a suburban or park-like urban setting.
description: A large, rustic log cabin with a dark gabled roof, stone foundation, and a covered porch. Timber construction and multiple windows give it a traditional, welcoming look.
description_view_0: The cabin is seen from above the front, highlighting the main entrance under a deep gabled overhang and the T-shaped layout.
description_view_1: This view shows the front facade with two small windows and the main entrance beneath the prominent roof overhang.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a large vertical window and the attached porch with timber railings, as well as the stone foundation.
description_view_3: The rear or opposite end of the cabin is visible, showing the symmetry of the roof and the depth of the overhangs.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with deep overhangs, intersecting gables, and a dark, matte finish
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple windows of varying sizes; two small, square windows on the front, a large vertical window on one side, and additional windows distributed asymmetrically along the facades
attribute_door_placement: Single main door centered on the front facade beneath the gabled overhang
